description: Windows 7 host MORTY-PC; user Rick; attacker drops wupd.exe (Meterpreter stager) via malicious download, establishes C2 to 185.220.101.47, exfiltrates SzechuanSauce_Formula_ULTRA_SECRET.docx

true_positives.notes: HKCU\Run -> wupd.exe and scheduled task WindowsUpdate both present
wupd.exe ran 7 times per Prefetch; confirmed by Amcache and EID 4688
wupd.exe present at %TEMP%, unsigned, YARA Meterpreter_Reverse_TCP hit
wupd.exe running as PID 2104, parent explorer.exe; network connections active

true_negatives.notes: No evidence of lateral movement; attack is contained to MORTY-PC
No LSASS dump, no Mimikatz artifacts; credential theft not demonstrated in this case
